name: angelica sinensis
title: best benefits of angelica sinensis
description: Angelica sinensis improves respiratory health by enhancing lung function and alleviating symptoms of respiratory disorders. This benefit is crucial as respiratory conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) can significantly impact an individual's quality of life, causing shortness of breath, wheezing, and coughing.
